content.text: This needs to be ready for Saturday morning.
We have assigned your request HEAL-33645 to an appropriate Help Desk team member. They will reach out to you shortly with an update.
Issue `HEAL-33645` has been assigned to me. I'm taking a look now and will keep you updated as I make progress.
Let me know if there's any additional context that might help.
Assigned the permission set Create_Credit_Card to Kershon Stephens
Kershon already has Account and Opportunity permissions via the Agent permission set, so those worked fine.
Confirmed in my sandbox this gives him the requested level of access

I have assigned the permission set Create_Credit_Card to Kershon and he already had Account and Opportunity permissions via the Agent permission set, so those worked fine. I also confirmed in my sandbox this gives the requested level of access.
I will update this issue as resolved. If anything changes, please let me know.
